name: machine
description: Machine plugins for long-running and multi-agent Claude Code workflows

plugins.name: assets
plugins.description: Local or remote tmux agent dispatch — spawn, monitor, and recall long-running coding agents in dedicated tmux windows

plugins.name: mesh-channel
plugins.description: Simple two-agent comms over a shared JSONL file — append-only protocol, per-agent cursor, Monitor-driven event wake

plugins.name: sop-compact
plugins.description: Hooks-only compaction-survival procedure for Claude Code. /init-sop-compact generates a per-repo .claude/sop-compact.md once; a PreCompact hook runs a claude -p sidecar that promotes durable learnings and writes a handoff snapshot before /compact; a SessionStart hook (gated on source=compact) points the new session at the latest handoff. Works with bare /compact (manual or auto).

plugins.name: sdlc
plugins.description: Closed-loop software-development-lifecycle harness — takes a GitHub issue to a mergeable PR via dispatched assets, then folds learnings into a per-repo playbook. Repo-agnostic methodology (backlog → dispatch → report → review → retro skills, qa subagent, SDD/TDD soft gates); each repo supplies only its own artifacts. Depends on assets + mesh-channel.
